Container.Name: warhammer-simulator
Container.Overview: Warhammer Practice Table web app. Requires an existing PostgreSQL container on the same Docker network.
Container.Requires: Requires an existing PostgreSQL container on the same Docker network.

Config.Name: Database URL
Config.Description: PostgreSQL connection string. Use the PostgreSQL container name as the host when both containers are on warhammer-net.

Config.Name: Public API Base URL
Config.Description: Leave blank unless the app is hosted behind a path or separate API origin.

Config.Name: Port
Config.Description: Optional host port for LAN testing. Reverse proxies on warhammer-net can use warhammer-simulator:3000 without this mapping.
